prompt:
Scene:
A vertical 9:16 new Chinese ink poster on smooth rice-white paper, composed with a wide empty upper field and a quiet architectural scene near the lower third. Use low-saturation mist blue, pale gray, charcoal ink, and a small celadon accent. The poster should feel like a refined cultural travel campaign, but without any brand mark or destination logo.

Subject:
A single arched stone moon bridge crosses a narrow lake, drawn in minimal ink with softened edges and a faint mirrored reflection. Behind it, two distant mountains fade into mist and a small round moon hangs high in the open space. Place the readable Chinese title "月桥过水" horizontally below the moon but above the bridge, with elegant modern Song-style typography and exact spacing between the four characters.

Important details:
Keep the bridge simple and iconic, not a detailed tourist illustration. The open sky must remain mostly blank, with only the moon and title interrupting it. The title should be crisp, centered on a stable invisible grid, and the only readable text. The bridge reflection should align with the waterline, proving structured layout control. Add no explanatory copy; let the mountain, bridge, water, and title carry the poster.

Use case:
New Chinese Ink Poster single study 7/8, testing architectural ink iconography, centered Chinese headline rendering, and spacious vertical travel-poster composition.

Constraints:
No readable text outside the specified Chinese title, no watermark, no logos, preserve exact 9:16 aspect ratio, no tourists, no lantern festival clutter, no saturated sunset, no fake destination branding, no heavy border, no broken bridge reflection.
title: Moon Bridge
description: A refined travel-style Chinese ink poster with a moon bridge, lake reflection, distant mountains, and the title Yue Qiao Guo Shui.

generation.runner_notes: Independent vertical poster study for moon-bridge architectural composition.

en.title: Moon Bridge
en.description: A refined travel-style Chinese ink poster with a moon bridge, lake reflection, distant mountains, and the title Yue Qiao Guo Shui.

zh-CN.title: 月桥过水
zh-CN.description: 文旅气质的新中式水墨海报,月桥、湖面倒影、远山和“月桥过水”标题构成极简布局。

alt.en: A vertical ink travel poster with a moon bridge, reflection, pale mountains, and a centered Chinese title.
alt.zh-CN: 竖版水墨文旅海报中有月桥倒影、淡山和居中的中文标题。
